title: Codebase Review & Refactoring for Technical Debt
body: Detailed epic description of codebase refactoring targets.

issues.title: Refactor pkg/server/server.go God Object (SRP Violation)
issues.body:
### Problem
`pkg/server/server.go` contains over 5,200 lines of code, violating the Single Responsibility Principle. It mixes gateway HTTP routing, SQLite operations, metrics collection, email sending, Nginx control, and WebSocket monitors.

### Plan
1. Identify and group independent domains.
2. Extract Nginx-specific maintenance file operations into a separate service or package.
3. Extract metrics collection queue processing into a `MetricsCollector` routine.
4. Extract email generation and SMTP triggering into a dedicated notification service.
5. Keep `server.go` strictly focused on gateway routing and connection multiplexing.

issues.title: Isolate database logic and SQL operations in pkg/db/db.go
issues.body:
### Problem
Migrations, schema declarations, and raw SQLite query routines are all coupled directly inside `pkg/db/db.go`.

### Plan
1. Introduce a Repository Pattern defining interfaces (e.g. `UserRepository`, `SubdomainRepository`).
2. Implement these interfaces using SQLite specific database handlers.
3. Move migrations and schema statements to independent files or a sub-folder `pkg/db/migrations/`.

issues.title: Decouple REST endpoint logic from API routing in pkg/server/api.go
issues.body:
### Problem
API handler routines inside `pkg/server/api.go` mix request body mapping, parameters validation, database calls, email delivery trigger, and HTTP header writes.

### Plan
1. Separate HTTP routing and JSON serialization from core business logic rules.
2. Introduce service interfaces/routines to handle business validation and DB orchestration independently from HTTP contexts.

issues.title: Externalize and Embed HTML/CSS templates
issues.body:
### Problem
Multi-line raw string literals are used in `pkg/server/server.go` (emails) and `pkg/server/proxy.go` (error screen fallbacks) to render HTML and CSS layouts.

### Plan
1. Extract nested HTML strings into standalone `.html` template files.
2. Use Go's native `embed` package to bundle and parse the templates at runtime.

issues.title: Integrate structured logger using log/slog
issues.body:
### Problem
The codebase uses standard `log.Print` / `log.Printf` logging, which lacks level filtering (debug/info/warn/error) and structured formats (like JSON).


### Plan
1. Introduce standard `log/slog` structured logging throughout the codebase.
2. Enable configurable log formatting (JSON in production, text/colors in dev) and level filtering.
